footer.tagline: Design-led studio crafting brands, products, and digital experiences that scale.

home.servicesDescription: From positioning to polish, every capability stays in lockstep with engineering. No handoffs breaking momentum.
home.service0Description: Web platforms and mobile applications engineered for clarity, speed, and real business outcomes.
home.service1Description: From ERP platforms to custom backends. Scalable architecture that grows with your business.
home.service2Description: Brand systems, motion design, and design tokens that stay cohesive across every touchpoint.
home.service3Description: Strategy through production. No handoffs, no lost context. One team from concept to launch.
home.comp0ThemDesc: Templates stretched thin, blending into the crowd.
home.comp0UsDesc: Every pixel from zero, rooted in your DNA.
home.comp1ThemDesc: Inconsistent spacing, clashing type, no shared logic.
home.comp1UsDesc: Tokens, components, motion. One system that scales.
home.comp2ThemDesc: Ornaments with no purpose or direction.
home.comp2UsDesc: Every decision traces back to strategy.
home.reelQuote: Crafting digital experiences that move people, from first impression to lasting impact.
home.step0Detail: Two-week intake focused on discovery, measurement frameworks, and scope locking. We surface every assumption before a line of code is written.
home.step1Detail: Weekly sprints covering design, engineering, QA, and stakeholder reviews. Momentum never pauses between disciplines.
home.step2Detail: Staging reviews, analytics setup, performance benchmarks, and handover for growth teams. Ready for scale on day one.
home.workDescription: Real client work and our own studio. Each project blends design, engineering, and strategy from concept to launch.

about.heroTitle: A studio built for brands that refuse to blend in
about.heroDescription: We are a multidisciplinary design and engineering studio. We partner with ambitious companies to create digital experiences that are visually striking, technically sound, and built for growth.
about.valuesDescription: Principles that shape how we work, what we build, and who we partner with.
about.value0Body: Every detail serves a purpose. We obsess over typography, motion, and interaction until the experience feels inevitable, not designed.
about.value1Body: Strategy, design, and engineering operate on the same sprint. No handoffs, no lost context, no momentum breaks.
about.value2Body: We build with production in mind from day one. Analytics, performance, accessibility, all baked in from the start.
about.value3Body: Weekly updates, shared Figma files, documented decisions. You always know where the project stands.
about.teamDescription: Senior-only, cross-functional, and fully committed. Every person on the team ships. No account managers, no middlemen.
about.capsDescription: From brand strategy to production-grade code, we cover the full spectrum so your project stays cohesive from concept to launch.
about.ctaDescription: We take on a limited number of projects each quarter to ensure every engagement gets our full attention.

work.pageDescription: Real client work, design explorations, and our own studio. Each project blends strategy, design, and engineering from concept to launch.
work.ctaDescription: We partner with teams that care about quality as much as we do. Let's talk about what you're building.

blog.pageDescription: Thoughts on design, engineering, and the craft of building digital products.

contact.pageDescription: Tell us about your vision. We'll reply within 48 hours with a tailored roadmap and estimate.
contact.errorBody: Please try again or email us directly.

meta.homeDescription: We design and engineer digital products for ambitious brands. Strategy, design, and engineering, from concept to launch.
meta.aboutDescription: A studio built for brands that refuse to blend in.
meta.blogDescription: Thoughts on design, engineering, and digital craft.
meta.contactDescription: Start a project with Orion Studio.
